description: Mack, Elena, and Coulson regroup near Afterlife's holding area for Inhumans. After coordinating information, they work together to take out Nathaniel's guards and free the captives. Elena demonstrates skill with her restored powers, and they prepare to rendezvous after their rescue, determined to also locate Kora.

transcript.line: The Inhumans are being held in a room down that way.
Alright. Better call Yo-Yo. Yo... Yo... Still not used to that.
May radio'd. Nathaniel's at the Lighthouse.
He's with John Garrett. I'll explain on the way back.
Okay. Yo-Yo and I will get the hostages out. Find Kora. We'll meet back at the Quinjet.
I got a feeling she might be expecting that.
For the record, I'm digging the upgrade. Alright. Let's get you out of here.
